problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: If Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
